basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultants Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 23 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) Recruitment 2026 for 23 posts of Individual Consultants. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 15-05-2026, and closes on 07-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through RITES official website rites.com.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Civil/Mining Engg., Master’s in Geology, Graduate in Electrical/Mechanical Engg., Graduate in IT/CS/Electrical/Electronics/Civil/Inst./Mech./Auto., Diploma in Civil/Survey Engg.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
